evals.prompt: Check if paper.docx is a valid Word document before editing.
assertions: nong word check <file.docx> --json returns status: ok or status: error with file_not_found
exit code is 0 when file exists, non-zero when file missing
expectations: AI should call nong word check paper.docx --json as the first step

evals.prompt: Read the plain text from contract.docx.
assertions: nong word read <file.docx> --json returns status: ok
expectations: AI should call nong word read, not try to open the file directly

evals.prompt: Create a new empty DOCX file.
assertions: nong word create document.nongmark -o out.docx --json returns status: ok
output file exists and has non-zero size
expectations: AI should write a .nongmark file and then call nong word create
